MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: WENDY H. CHAU'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS ANGELITA LOUIE AND ZEN LOUIE LLC.

Appearances via Zoom: Wendy H. Chau of the Law Offices of Wendy H. Chau (415.539.6116), counsel for defendants and moving to be relieved; Richard Zuromski of Seifert Zuromski LLP (415.293.7966) for plaintiff and responding party.

Ms. Chau informs the Court that defendant Angelita Louie is having connection issues to join the hearing via Zoom.

The motion is discussed and the Court grants the motion. Ms. Chau is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
